body:
### Kind
plugin

### Repository URL
https://github.com/vmoranv/jshook_plugin_knowledge_base

### Slug
knowledge-base

### Extension ID
io.github.vmoranv.knowledge-base

### Git Ref
main

### Subpath
.

### Entry File
manifest.ts

### Repository Snapshot Link
- Repo: https://github.com/vmoranv/jshook_plugin_knowledge_base
- Commit: https://github.com/vmoranv/jshook_plugin_knowledge_base/commit/3886ff95490704ac28c299a27aaa3ae865237f73

### Capability Vector Declaration
- kind: plugin
- scope: persistent target knowledge recall/write for cross-session reverse sessions
- tools: append_target_insight, recall_target_insights
- config: plugins.knowledge-base.enabled, plugins.knowledge-base.root
- metrics: none declared
- profile: workflow
- storage: local note files under the configured knowledge root

### Allowlist Impact Review
- toolExecution.allowTools: no additional allowlist requested
- network.allowHosts: no additional host allowlist requested
- current behavior: local filesystem read/write only, no outbound network

### Invocation Example Benchmark
- verification: pnpm run check and pnpm run build passed on 2026-03-25
- response profile: local file-backed note append/recall
- entry file: manifest.ts
title: [register] plugin: https://github.com/vmoranv/jshook_plugin_knowledge_base

### Kind

### Repository URL

### Slug

io.github.vmoranv.script-presets

### Git Ref
main

### Subpath
.

### Entry File
manifest.ts

### Repository Snapshot Link
- Repo: https://github.com/vmoranv/jshook_plugin_script_presets
- Commit: https://github.com/vmoranv/jshook_plugin_script_presets/commit/179dbfaa77a4b85e48c5f2e469d4edbdcf24e8e8

### Capability Vector Declaration
- kind: plugin
- scope: scaffold externalization of built-in page_script preset packs
- tools: script_presets_health, script_presets_catalog
- config: plugins.script-presets.enabled, plugins.script-presets.mode
- metrics: script_presets_health_calls_total, script_presets_catalog_calls_total
- externalization target: built-in page_script presets
- preset packs: auth_extract, bundle_search, react_fill_form, dom_find_upgrade_buttons

### Allowlist Impact Review
- toolExecution.allowTools: no additional allowlist requested in current scaffold
- network.allowHosts: no additional host allowlist requested in current scaffold
- current behavior: local JSON response only, no outbound network

### Invocation Example Benchmark
- verification: `pnpm run check` passed on 2026-03-25
- response profile: local constant-size JSON for health/catalog tools
- entry file: manifest.ts
title: [register] plugin: https://github.com/vmoranv/jshook_plugin_script_presets

- mission ids: signature-locate, websocket-reverse, bundle-unpack, login-flow-capture, anti-detect-diagnosis
